LanguageData.ABY_AshboundTreadBoots.label: ashbound tread boots
LanguageData.ABY_AshboundTreadBoots.description: Early abyssal tread boots built from steel sole plates, residue-laced shock pads and crude ember stabilizers. They are not elegant, but they let a colonist carry more, move faster and keep their footing near machines that were never meant to be safe.
LanguageData.ABY_RiftstepGreaves.label: riftstep greaves
LanguageData.ABY_RiftstepGreaves.description: Mid-tier riftstep greaves with plasteel calf braces, stabilized heel conduits and violet-red phase anchors under the sole. They do not teleport the wearer; they simply make every step feel as if the ground has been ordered to cooperate.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownpathSabatons.label: crownpath sabatons
LanguageData.ABY_CrownpathSabatons.description: Late-line sabatons grown around a compact crownpath lattice. Their plated soles behave less like footwear and more like a portable claim of passage: each step is stabilized, authorized and quietly hostile to the terrain beneath it.
